companies.volume: About 8,000 - 15,000 units/year. Netflix's main computing and application logic (non-streaming parts) run entirely on AWS cloud, so no server procurement in this area. However, its global content delivery network (CDN) — Open Connect — consists of tens of thousands of self-designed Open Connect Appliances (OCA) servers, which are regularly updated and expanded.
companies.platform: Custom-designed Open Connect Appliances (OCA). These are high storage density, high network throughput servers optimized for video streaming. Early models used Intel Xeon processors; recently also introduced AMD EPYC platforms to enhance performance and density. Architecturally two types: one based on large-capacity HDD storage OCA, another based on NVMe SSD flash memory OCA for higher traffic demands.
companies.application: Specifically used for video content caching and streaming delivery. OCA servers are deployed in network exchange points (IXPs) and ISP data centers worldwide to store video content closest to users, reducing latency and improving playback quality.
companies.currentSuppliers: Mainly ODM manufacturers such as Supermicro, Wiwynn, Quanta; Netflix provides hardware designs, these manufacturers handle production.

companies.asusModel: Due to Netflix OCA being highly customized storage servers, no exact standard product matches. companies.volume: Approx. 500 - 1,500 units/year (As a large financial services company, procurement is mainly for periodic updates and business expansion, not ultra-large scale procurement)
companies.platform: 1U/2U general-purpose rack servers primarily based on Intel Xeon or AMD EPYC, used for enterprise-level applications and databases.
companies.application: Core financial trading systems, customer relationship management (CRM), data analysis, network security, internal IT infrastructure.Adopts a hybrid cloud strategy, with some services deployed on Microsoft Azure.
companies.currentSuppliers: It is speculated to be first-tier OEM brands such as Dell Technologies, HPE, and Lenovo.
companies.asusModel: General 1U: RS700-E11, General 2U: RS720-E12, General 2U AMD: RS720A-E12.
companies.channel: Procurement may be made through large system integrators (SIs) or channel distributors (DISTs), such as CDW, SHI, Insight Enterprises.
companies.challenges: [Financial Industry Tactics][Technical Requirements]Corebridge Financial has clear requirements for server quality and technical support, and needs to provide complete technical documents and after-sales service commitments. [Supply Chain Barriers]The current main supplier is speculated to be a first-tier OEM brand such as Dell Technologies, HPE, or Lenovo. It has established a stable cooperative relationship and service system. ASUS needs to show clear differentiated value to win replacement or new opportunities. [Business Challenges]The procurement decision-making process is complex, involving multiple departments (IT, procurement, finance), and the decision-making cycle is long.Need to follow up the whole process from technical verification, business negotiation to contract signing. [Industry Characteristics]The financial industry has extremely high requirements for system stability, information security compliance (such as PCI DSS), and disaster recovery. Server suppliers need to provide complete security certification and SLA guarantees.
companies.entryPoint: [Financial Industry Tactics][Short-term (3-6 months)]1. Recommend the ASUS server product line to Corebridge Financial through existing channel partners, and arrange product demonstrations and technical exchanges.2. Provide competitive quotation solutions for its upcoming equipment update cycle. [Mid-term (6-12 months)]3. Provide server solutions that meet the compliance requirements of the financial industry, including security certification, encryption functions, and disaster recovery solutions.4. Recommend the ASUS ESC series GPU server for Corebridge Financial's AI/ML application needs. [Long-term (1-2 years)]5. Strive to become an approved vendor list (AVL) of Corebridge Financial and establish a long-term cooperation framework agreement.6. Jointly develop customized server solutions with Corebridge Financial's technical team for their specific needs to deepen the cooperative relationship. [Key Actions]Appoint a dedicated account manager to be responsible for Corebridge Financial customers, establish initial contact through the channel column, and arrange the first technical exchange meeting within 30 days.
